text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe's dream is not to conquer the
Japanese Derby. And yet...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This once-in-a-lifetime opportunity is too
tempting to resist.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I... think this lap time...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Might just be... good enough for the Derby. If I
win... I should be able to reach my friend too...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's okay... I wouldn't say I'm in top form, but
that's normal for me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I am not sure if we should enter the Derby.
Frankly, it won't be an easy decision to make.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But if the two of us hold on to hope, then we'll
have a chance. We can figure out the details a
little later.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'd like you to put more pressure on me. Please be
a little tougher than last time...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Don't.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A voice as sharp as a blade cuts through my
response.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's perfectly fine to have unscientific dreams, but
it would be foolish to only realize they're
unscientific after they've been crushed.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I won't tell you to stay out of the Japanese Derby.
But perhaps you should scale back on all that
dream-chasing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Cafe, you're in no condition to handle tough
training.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Tachyon. How would... you know...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, I know quite a lot. Since I quit racing, I've
had plenty of time on my hands.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And how am I spending my free time? Exclusively
on researching you. It's a grand exercise in
time-killing—from morning to morning!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But that research has shown me things. Such as
that our priority should not be exhausting that
scrawny body of yours, but allowing it to fully
recover. We need to restore your body mass.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If you really want some tough training, then let's
see how you do. Right now, clear three ramps.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You'll fall short four sevenths of the way through
the second ramp.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The results are as she predicted. Manhattan Cafe
gets halfway up the second ramp before her legs
give out.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: See, I told you this would happen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You don't need precognition to predict outcomes
as uninteresting as this. Poor form indeed.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And just to let you know, this exercise doubled as
a test. If I'd been wrong, your trainer's gamble
would have been justified.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This proves it. There's no point in pushing
ourselves to try and win the Japanese Derby. The
dream needs a reality check.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
After all, we're a team of oddballs. We're all mad,
so let's stop trying to act normal.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You think I'm "mad"? Maybe, but...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You're far more... out there...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, hahaha! I won't argue with that! Oh, it
looks like your frown's a little closer to being
upside-down!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now, I'm sure you'll both agree that now's not the
time to be rushing things.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This doesn't mean I'm suggesting that we overhaul
our entire approach. Instead...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I just brought truth into the equation. Right,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Pressed to make a decision, I turn to Manhattan
Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Well... Easing up... might do us some good...
maybe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: If Manhattan Cafe is all right with the idea...
choice_data_list: Okay. I'll give it careful consideration.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, a wise decision. Though, I'm sure you
knew all this anyway. Just as I knew that you
would know it.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... Let's take things at a slower pace, for
now at least...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Agnes Tachyon involved, we're able to make
tough decisions with greater veracity. This should
stand us in good stead come fall.
